description_long: This object is a long, rectangular radio receiver with a prominent, thin antenna extending from one end. The main body is a deep, box-like structure, likely housing the internal electronics, and features a dark, matte finish. The antenna is metallic and slender, contrasting with the bulkier body. The handle or grip area near the antenna base appears textured or slightly lighter in color, possibly for ergonomic handling. There are no visible dials, buttons, or display screens on the exterior, suggesting a minimalist or utilitarian design. The overall appearance is modern and streamlined, suitable for urban environments where portability and durability are valued.
description: A sleek, rectangular radio receiver with a long, thin metallic antenna and a dark, boxy body. The design is minimalist, with no visible controls or display.
description_view_0: Front view shows the thin, extended antenna and the narrow profile of the radio receiver.
description_view_1: Angled view reveals the deep, rectangular body and the protruding antenna, highlighting the open or recessed top surface.
description_view_2: Side view emphasizes the slimness of the antenna and the compact width of the main body.
description_view_3: Opposite angled view displays the length of the body and the attachment point of the antenna.
